source_meta.source_document: JOURNEY II PFJ Patellofemoral Joint with Oxidized Zirconium

systems.system_notes: Patellofemoral arthroplasty platform within the JOURNEY knee family using OXINIUM material technology.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials expose the JOURNEY PFJ surgical technique, implying a dedicated operative instrumentation set.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the patellofemoral femoral implant within the JOURNEY PFJ system.
Official product materials describe the patellar resurfacing component within the JOURNEY PFJ construct.
